title: K12 Mathematics Multimodal Teaching Agent
summary: A Qwen fine-tuned teaching agent for K12 mathematics. It combines instruction tuning, Socratic dialogue, chain-of-thought guided decomposition, OCR and semantic understanding for image-text questions.

title: English AI Oral Coaching System
summary: An oral practice system based on Whisper, GenAI and Kokoro TTS. It uses LoRA for accent adaptation, SFT for professional feedback generation and GPU cluster deployment for real-time scoring.

title: Educational RAG Agent
summary: A retrieval-augmented intelligent agent for education scenarios, designed to connect private knowledge, teaching logic and interactive question-answering flows.

title: AI Teaching Platform
summary: A platform concept that connects school teachers, tutors and students. Work includes fine-tuning setup, frontend/backend integration and application scenario design.

title: Booster K1 Robot Web Control
summary: A distributed control architecture based on the Booster K1 robot SDK, including web remote control, motion planning and playback, multimodal interaction and communication protocol integration.

title: Time-Series Event Modeling Research Replication
summary: Data engineering and deep learning framework replication for multi-source heterogeneous datasets, including time series, event labels and covariate features across public datasets.

title: AI + Hybrid Semantic Network Vocabulary Paper
summary: A paper under review on using the synergy of artificial intelligence and hybrid semantic networks to support long-term and efficient mastery of college English vocabulary.

title: Huawei ICT Competition 2025-2026
summary: Represented EdUHK in the Huawei ICT Competition Hong Kong SAR, winning first place in the Group AI category and fourth place in the Cloud category.
